## Meeting Purpose

[Review and discuss UI updates for the assignments feature and plan next steps for the project.](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The assignments UI is in good shape, with minor adjustments needed for clarity and hierarchy](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Assignments will be moved to the project level, with each project having a designated pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [The team will proceed with developing the Pages feature next, as it's crucial for tracking metrics](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)

## Topics

### UI Review for Assignments Feature

  - [Current view includes status, name, content type, date modified, and author](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Sorting options available by name, type, and person](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Bulk actions implemented for status changes and assignments](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Two main tabs: "Brief" (formerly "Editor") and "Content" (formerly "Generated Output")](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Need to improve visibility and styling of the tab controls](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Consideration for adding a publishing button for clients with publishing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### Nomenclature and UX Improvements

  - [Renamed "Generated Output" to "Content" to better reflect the collaborative nature of the work](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Discussed moving the "Generate" button to "Send to Production" or similar terminology](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Proposed making the tab controls more prominent in the UI hierarchy](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Suggested adding a option to set up publishing workflows at the project level](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)

### Project Structure and Pipeline Integration

  - [Assignments will be moved to the project level instead of inventory level](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Projects can have multiple pipelines, but one active pipeline for assignments](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Need to address backend complexities when changing pipelines for in-progress assignments](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [UI for selecting pipelines should be simple, with backend handling the complexity](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

### Next Steps for Development

  - [Move assignments to the project level and adjust the workflow accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Implement import/export functionality for opportunities and assignments](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Begin work on the Pages feature, focusing on the index view first](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Schedule a call to brief Stevie on the project context and definitions](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Georgemaine to move assignments under projects and update the generation flow](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Daniel to send notes to Brad regarding pipeline integration and assignment handoff](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Georgemaine to start development on the Pages feature, beginning with the index view](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Daniel to search for and share the detailed data structure for Pages with Georgemaine](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Georgemaine to schedule a briefing call with Stevie to explain project context and terminology](https://fathom.video/share/F5xfxJj47CybrV136Q47eNhRMEWMZfPx?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
